---
title: "复杂电力系统认知实验室"
subtitle: "Complex Power System Laboratory | CPSL"
description: "本站面向电气工程、新型电力系统和能源数字化方向，提供电力系统基础知识、开放实验平台和实验室研究成果介绍。网站内容主要用于科普、课程辅助和学术交流。"
toc: false
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: images/banner.jpg
title-block-banner-color: "white"
title-block-style: default
back-to-top-navigation: false
---

::: {.home-section-heading}
::: {.home-section-title}
## 研究焦点
:::
[查看更多](research/01_rei_dispatch.qmd){.home-section-more}
:::

::: {.home-card-row}
::: columns

::: {.column width="25%"}
::: {.home-card .home-card-research}
![](/images/index_digital_twin.svg){.home-card-image}

::: {.home-card-title}
数字孪生与能源元宇宙
:::

构建跨设备、场站与区域的多层级交互式孪生平台，支撑可视化推演、运行状态同步与实时策略校核。
:::
:::

::: {.column width="25%"}
::: {.home-card .home-card-research}
![](/images/index_system.png){.home-card-image}

::: {.home-card-title}
虚拟电厂与需求响应
:::

面向电动汽车、储能、分布式光伏和柔性负荷，研究资源聚合、能力评估与多主体协同调度。
:::
:::

::: {.column width="25%"}
::: {.home-card .home-card-research}
![](/images/index_big_data.png){.home-card-image}

::: {.home-card-title}
高维统计与人工智能
:::

针对低信噪比、多源异构电力数据，发展高维特征提取、异常检测、状态识别与预测模型。
:::
:::

::: {.column width="25%"}
::: {.home-card .home-card-research}
![](/images/index_gil.png){.home-card-image}

::: {.home-card-title}
数字孪生能源系统落地
:::

围绕园区能源、配电网运行和新能源消纳，开展仿真推演、策略评估与工程化平台开发。
:::
:::

:::
:::

::: {.home-section-heading}
::: {.home-section-title}
## 教学资料
:::
[查看更多](teaching.qmd){.home-section-more}
:::

::: {.home-card-row}
::: columns

::: {.column width="25%"}
::: {.home-card}

::: {.home-card-title}
潮流计算与最优潮流基础
:::

面向电力系统入门学习，覆盖建模基础、潮流计算与最优潮流基础问题。

::: {.home-card-actions}
[下载 PDF](files/电力系统潮流计算与最优潮流基础-v0.1.pdf){.home-button}
:::

:::
:::

:::
:::

::: {.home-section-heading}
::: {.home-section-title}
## 开放实验平台
:::
[查看更多](platform.qmd){.home-section-more}
:::

::: {.home-card-row}
::: columns

::: {.column width="25%"}
::: {.home-card}

::: {.home-card-title}
区域综合能源系统多能主体互动调控仿真推演孪生实验平台
:::

面向区域综合能源系统，支撑多能主体互动、运行调控与仿真推演。

::: {.home-card-actions}
[进入平台](https://cpslee.net/energy-suite/){.home-button}
[接口文档](https://cpslee.net/api/energy-suite/docs){.home-button .home-button-secondary}
:::

:::
:::

::: {.column width="25%"}
::: {.home-card}

::: {.home-card-title}
园区充电服务费动态定价实验平台
:::

面向园区充电服务费动态定价，支撑需求分析、策略生成与效果评估。

::: {.home-card-actions}
[进入平台](https://cpslee.net/ev-market/){.home-button}
[接口文档](https://cpslee.net/api/ev-market/docs){.home-button .home-button-secondary}
:::

:::
:::

:::
:::
